The '''Mission to Ossus''' was an event during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Amidst rumors of a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] presence on [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]], a team composed of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]] and the [[New Republic Archaeological Corps]] was dispatched to prevent the invaders from uncovering any secrets that could reveal any weaknesses of the ''Jeedai''.
